finite_trial_formal_tail.definition: the recorded trial is the finite sum over its mode_order
finite_trial_formal_tail.outside_cutoff_coefficients: exactly zero by definition of this finite trial
finite_trial_formal_tail.note: This is not an error bound to an unknown infinite automorphic form.

unknown_infinite_expansion_tail.definition: sum of unknown coefficients beyond the recorded cutoff
unknown_infinite_expansion_tail.blocker: No coefficients outside the independently solved finite space and no certified coefficient-growth envelope are present.  Bessel decay alone cannot bound an arbitrary coefficient sequence.

theorem_interpretation: D(K) applies directly to a finite Whittaker quasimode and requires its cusp L2 decay; it does not require approximation to an unknown infinite expansion.
